notes: Default gravity deck — same shuffle/draw semantics as the Fool's, with cards tuned to Elicia's listener-loop. Endgame cards (flagged) ride at the bottom of the pile per the engine's split-shuffle so heavy beats land in the back half of the session.

deck.title: the cicadas pause
deck.flavor: outside, the cicadas all stop at once. for fifteen seconds the night is what it claims to be.

deck.title: tape drift
deck.flavor: the master reel speeds up by a hair. nobody can hear it but you.

deck.title: a visitor lingers in the lounge
deck.flavor: someone is finishing a magazine that's six months old. they will not be rushed.

deck.title: the cathedral calls
deck.flavor: frasier knocks on the back door. he doesn't come in.

deck.title: wrong take
deck.flavor: the take had a buzz. you didn't catch it.

deck.title: the returner speaks
deck.flavor: the returner says something true while you were turned around. you missed it.

deck.title: patch short
deck.flavor: a cable shorts. the booth and the lounge bleed into each other.

deck.title: outside, a voice
deck.flavor: someone yelling something half a block away that you almost catch.

deck.title: the kettle boils through
deck.flavor: the kitchenette's kettle has gone past third gear. the room smells of warmth and copper.

deck.title: an old tape skips
deck.flavor: a tape in the library skips on its own. you can hear it from the console.

deck.title: the phone rings through
deck.flavor: the unplugged landline rings anyway. you don't pick it up. it stops.

deck.title: reel overrun
deck.flavor: the reel is filling faster than tonight is finishing. the leader-tape is in sight.

deck.title: the truth arrives
deck.flavor: someone unscheduled is in the entry hall. they have come to say one thing and leave.

deck.title: the long quiet falls
deck.flavor: the room is suddenly quieter than it has any right to be.

deck.title: the cicadas resume
deck.flavor: the cicadas come back louder than before. the night announces it knows what's happening.
